narrative:
Blanchard Twp township has 834 registered voters, with 42.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 50.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 43.8 percentage points.
